Class BatchAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<BatchAdapter.ViewHolder>
androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter<BatchCardSummary, BatchAdapter.ViewHolder>
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BatchAdapter
public class BatchAdapter extends ListAdapter<BatchCardSummary, BatchAdapter.ViewHolder>
RecyclerView adapter for displaying batch card summaries in a list.
